Use green crepe paper to build tree-like structures. Hang yellow streamers from the ceiling. Place large animal cutouts around the room. Use gold stars on the wall. Arrange blue fabric flowers on the floor. Set up white bunting across the entrance. Cover tables with grass-green tablecloths. Scatter red and orange marbles on the carpet. Add wooden logs to the side area. Put plastic vines in planters.
